description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular footprint with a flat roof and large, multi-pane windows on all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with some sections displaying a stone or brick texture, particularly visible on the interior partition walls. The front facade includes a prominent arched doorway and a set of wide windows with shutters, while the rear and side facades are characterized by symmetrical window arrangements. Inside, the layout is open with visible staircases, interior doors, and partitioned rooms, suggesting a modern, open-plan design. Circular window elements are present on the upper sections of the walls, adding architectural interest. The overall style is clean and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and functional living spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with large multi-pane windows, flat roof, and a mix of smooth and stone-textured walls. Features include an arched doorway, shutters, and open-plan interior with visible stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched doorway, wide windows with shutters, and a staircase visible through the windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular window, symmetrical window arrangement, and interior partition walls.
description_view_2: Rear view with large, evenly spaced windows and a clear view of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing stone-textured interior walls, multiple doors, and a prominent circular window above the main living area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
